title: Dhuna
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Dhunas''' were domestic animals native to [[Bellassa/Legends|Bellassa]]. [[Ussa]]n priests took the bodies of the dead to burial in flower-covered, white carts pulled by dhunas. The priests coaxed the dhunas along by making sounds similar to the chants the priests would sing in the streets. [[Dona Telamark]] used such a cart to smuggle [[Amie Antin]] away from [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] custody.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: Against the Empire]]''
